task_description: Implement Next-Generation eKYC (electronic Know Your Customer) System as a new industry use case. The system provides digital identity verification using AWS Strands framework for multi-agent orchestration, AWS Bedrock AgentCore SDK for agent deployment, and AWS Nova ACT SDK for QA testing. Features include 5 specialized verification agents (Document, Biometric, Compliance, Fraud Detection, Manual Review), RESTful API with OpenAPI 3.0 spec, client SDKs (Python/JavaScript), CloudFormation infrastructure templates, and comprehensive security following existing repository patterns. Performance targets: 10,000 concurrent sessions, <60s end-to-end verification, 99.9% uptime.

features.description: Create eKYC directory structure, README.md, requirements.txt, and setup.py with project metadata and dependencies
steps: Create ekyc/ directory structure as specified in the requirements
Create README.md with project overview, architecture, setup instructions, API documentation summary, and security compliance information
Create requirements.txt with all Python dependencies (strands-agents, bedrock-agentcore, boto3, fastapi, cryptography, pydantic, etc.)
Create setup.py with package metadata, entry points, and classifiers
Create __init__.py files for all Python packages
Verify directory structure matches specification

features.description: Create base eKYC agent class extending secure_base_agent.py with identity verification-specific security controls
steps: Create src/agents/base_ekyc_agent.py extending SecureBaseAgent from common/secure_base_agent.py
Add eKYC-specific security configuration (biometric data handling, PII protection, consent management)
Implement verification session management with timeout handling (60-second workflow timeout)
Add KYC-specific audit logging with 7-year retention configuration
Implement data encryption helpers for AES-256 biometric data encryption
Add compliance check decorators for GDPR, AML, and KYC regulations

features.description: Create Pydantic data models for sessions, documents, biometrics, and screening results with DynamoDB schemas
steps: Create src/models/__init__.py with model exports
Create src/models/session.py with VerificationSession model (DynamoDB schema, status enum, 60s timeout)
Create src/models/document.py with DocumentData model (encrypted fields, 150+ country support, document types)
Create src/models/biometric.py with BiometricData model (encrypted storage, retention policies, liveness data)
Create src/models/screening.py with ScreeningResult, WatchlistEntry, PEPEntry, AdverseMediaEntry models
Add data validation and encryption field helpers for all sensitive data fields

features.description: Create AWS service integration classes for Textract, Rekognition, KMS encryption, and watchlist databases
steps: Create src/services/__init__.py with service exports
Create src/services/textract_service.py with OCR extraction methods (3-second target), document parsing, and quality validation
Create src/services/rekognition_service.py with face matching (95% threshold, 5-second target) and liveness detection (10-second target)
Create src/services/encryption_service.py with KMS integration, AES-256-GCM encryption, and key rotation support
Create src/services/watchlist_service.py with OFAC, UN, EU, UK sanctions integration and fuzzy matching (80% threshold)
Create src/services/dynamodb_service.py for session and result persistence with TTL management

features.description: Implement Document Verification Agent with Textract OCR, document authenticity checks, and 150+ country support
steps: Create src/agents/document_verification_agent.py extending BaseEKYCAgent
Implement document capture API endpoint handler with image quality validation
Add AWS Textract OCR integration with 3-second extraction target
Implement document authenticity verification (holograms, watermarks, microprinting detection patterns)
Add document type detection and routing (passport, driver's license, national ID)
Implement country-specific validation rules for 150+ countries
Create verification result model with confidence scores and extracted fields

features.description: Implement Biometric Verification Agent with Rekognition face matching and multi-mode liveness detection
steps: Create src/agents/biometric_verification_agent.py extending BaseEKYCAgent
Implement selfie capture API endpoint handler with quality checks
Add AWS Rekognition face matching with 95% accuracy threshold and 5-second target
Implement active liveness detection (random challenges: head movements, expressions, blinking)
Implement passive liveness detection (texture analysis, depth estimation, micro-movement detection)
Add AES-256 encryption for all biometric data before storage
Create liveness result model with challenge-response records and confidence scores

features.description: Implement Compliance Screening Agent with watchlist integration, PEP/adverse media checks, and audit trail
steps: Create src/agents/compliance_screening_agent.py extending BaseEKYCAgent
Implement OFAC, UN, EU, UK sanctions database integration with fuzzy matching
Add PEP (Politically Exposed Persons) database integration with relationship mapping
Implement adverse media database integration with sentiment analysis
Add fuzzy name matching with 80% confidence threshold and phonetic algorithms
Implement 15-second screening target with parallel watchlist queries
Create 7-year audit trail with S3 Glacier archival integration
Add match result model with risk scoring and match explanations

features.description: Implement Fraud Detection Agent with device fingerprinting, velocity checks, and ML-based scoring
steps: Create src/agents/fraud_detection_agent.py extending BaseEKYCAgent
Implement device fingerprinting with browser/device attribute collection
Add geolocation analysis with VPN/proxy detection algorithms
Implement velocity checks with 24-hour rolling window tracking
Add synthetic identity detection ML model integration
Create 0-100 verification scoring system with risk factor breakdown
Implement configurable thresholds for auto-approve (80+), auto-reject (<30), and manual review (30-80)
Add fraud signal aggregation and decision explanation generation

features.description: Implement Manual Review Agent with queue management, reviewer dashboard interface, and SLA tracking
steps: Create src/agents/manual_review_agent.py extending BaseEKYCAgent
Implement DynamoDB-based review queue system with priority ordering
Add compliance officer dashboard interface data provider
Create side-by-side image viewer data preparation (document vs selfie)
Implement decision recording with mandatory reason codes and audit trail
Add 5-minute notification SLA tracking with escalation triggers
Create reviewer assignment and workload balancing logic
Implement review decision model with approval/rejection/escalation states

features.description: Implement AWS Strands orchestrator with workflow state machine and inter-agent communication
steps: Create src/orchestration/__init__.py with orchestrator exports
Create src/orchestration/strands_orchestrator.py with Strands framework integration
Implement agent execution order: document → biometric → compliance → fraud → manual review (conditional)
Create src/orchestration/workflow_state_machine.py with verification session states
Add inter-agent communication via event bus pattern
Implement 60-second workflow timeout with graceful handling
Create result aggregation logic combining all agent outputs
Add workflow retry logic and error recovery mechanisms

features.description: Implement RESTful API with FastAPI, OpenAPI 3.0 spec, OAuth 2.0 auth, and webhook system
steps: Create src/api/__init__.py with API exports
Create src/api/routes.py with all RESTful endpoints (sessions, documents, selfies, results, webhooks, analytics)
Create src/api/schemas.py with Pydantic request/response schemas
Create src/api/openapi.yaml with complete OpenAPI 3.0 specification
Implement OAuth 2.0 + API key authentication middleware
Add rate limiting (1000 req/min per organization) with Redis backend
Implement webhook system with exponential backoff retry logic
Add request validation and error handling middleware

features.description: Create Python SDK with async support, retry logic, and comprehensive examples
steps: Create sdk/python/ directory structure with package files
Create sdk/python/ekyc_client/__init__.py with client exports
Create sdk/python/ekyc_client/client.py with EKYCClient class (async/sync support)
Create sdk/python/ekyc_client/models.py with SDK-specific data models
Create sdk/python/ekyc_client/exceptions.py with custom exception classes
Create sdk/python/setup.py and pyproject.toml for package distribution
Create sdk/python/examples/ with usage examples for all endpoints
Create sdk/python/README.md with installation and usage documentation

features.description: Create JavaScript/TypeScript SDK with Promise-based API and browser/Node.js support
steps: Create sdk/javascript/ directory structure with package files
Create sdk/javascript/package.json with dependencies and build configuration
Create sdk/javascript/src/index.ts with main client export
Create sdk/javascript/src/client.ts with EKYCClient class
Create sdk/javascript/src/types.ts with TypeScript interfaces
Create sdk/javascript/tsconfig.json with TypeScript configuration
Create sdk/javascript/examples/ with usage examples
Create sdk/javascript/README.md with installation and usage documentation

features.description: Create CloudFormation templates for all AWS resources and AgentCore deployment configuration
steps: Create infrastructure/cloudformation/ directory structure
Create infrastructure/cloudformation/ekyc-stack.yaml with main stack template
Add API Gateway configuration with custom domain and WAF integration
Add Cognito user pool configuration with MFA and password policies
Add DynamoDB tables configuration with encryption and TTL
Add S3 buckets configuration with encryption and lifecycle policies
Add KMS key configuration with rotation policies
Create infrastructure/config/agentcore-config.yaml for Bedrock AgentCore deployment
Create deployment/agentcore-config.yaml with eKYC-specific agent configuration
Create deployment/deployment-guide.md with step-by-step deployment instructions

features.description: Create Nova ACT test framework with functional, performance, and security test scenarios
steps: Create tests/ directory structure (unit/, integration/, nova_act/)
Create tests/nova_act/config.yaml with Nova ACT SDK configuration
Create tests/nova_act/functional/ with end-to-end verification test scenarios
Create tests/nova_act/performance/ with load testing scenarios (10,000 concurrent sessions)
Create tests/nova_act/security/ with security validation scenarios
Create tests/unit/ with unit tests for all agents and services
Create tests/integration/ with integration tests for API and orchestration
Create conftest.py with pytest fixtures and test utilities

features.description: Create comprehensive documentation including API reference, architecture diagrams, and integration guides
steps: Create docs/ directory structure
Create docs/api-reference.md with detailed API endpoint documentation
Create docs/architecture.md with system architecture, data flow diagrams, and component descriptions
Create docs/integration-guide.md with step-by-step integration instructions for various platforms
Create docs/security.md with security implementation details and compliance information
Create docs/troubleshooting.md with common issues and solutions
Update main README.md with links to all documentation
Add Mermaid diagrams for workflow visualization
